\tzpentry{ID3586}{Gyromagnetic Vector Potential Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3586 introduces Gyromagnetic Vector Potential Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \vec{A}_{\text{gyro}}(\vec{r}, t) = \frac{\mu_0}{4\pi} \int_{V_{\text{gyro}}} \frac{\vec{J}_{\text{gyro}}(\vec{r}', t)}{|\vec{r} - \vec{r}'|} d^3r' \end{equation}
